codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking Codex regression by requiring explicit cumulative input/output fields before enabling cumulative precedence, which preserves delta parsing for partial token_count payloads and prevents zeroed usage rows.

issues.description: Regression tests for this fix were added under Parked tests, which are intentionally excluded from the active OpenBurnBarTests target; this reduces ongoing automated protection unless equivalent coverage is moved to Active.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Fix validation tests exist in Parked rather than Active tests, so they do not run in the normal OpenBurnBarTests bundle.

priorBlockingIssueResolution.issue: Partial/placeholder token_count maps were treated as cumulative (0,0,0), setting foundCumulative and suppressing valid delta accumulation.
support: AgentLens/Services/LogParser/TokenExtractionUtility.swift:530-533 now guard for explicit token_count.input_tokens and token_count.output_tokens; missing fields return nil.

AgentLens/Services/UsageAggregatorParsers.swift:805 and 824 mean cumulative precedence now only triggers when codexCumulativeTotalsFromTokenCountInfo returns a valid tuple, otherwise delta parsing remains active.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The token-accounting-worker skill requires additional verification commands and strict procedure reporting, but this handoff reports followedProcedure=true while only xcodebuild tests are listed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/token-accounting-worker/SKILL.md:31-38 requires swift test and npm lint plus truthful followedProcedure reporting; handoff 2026-04-09T00-35-59-101Z lists only xcodebuild commands (lines 14-22) and still sets followedProcedure=true (line 60).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-critical regression tests were added under Parked, which is intentionally excluded from active test execution, suggesting a convention gap on where to place enforceable parser regression tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: project.yml:126-128 includes only AgentLensTests/Active and AgentLensTests/Support in OpenBurnBarTests; AgentLensTests/README.md:9,12,29 states Parked tests are not compiled and do not affect CI; fix tests were added at AgentLensTests/Parked/ParserIntegrationTests.swift:879-984.

summary: Reviewed original failing feature commit 8795892 and fix commit 9926414 with corresponding handoffs/transcript skeletons. The prior blocking Codex cumulative-vs-delta precedence regression is resolved by explicit cumulative field gating in TokenExtractionUtility, and no new blocking runtime defects were identified in the fix.
